description_long: This is a classic upright arcade game cabinet themed for Mortal Kombat, featuring a tall, rectangular structure with a prominent display screen and a control panel below. The front panel is decorated with the Mortal Kombat logo and dragon emblem, while the top marquee displays the game's title in bold, fiery lettering. The control panel is equipped with multiple joysticks and colored buttons, designed for two players, and is flanked by a coin slot mechanism. The side panels are adorned with large, detailed character artwork—one side features Sub-Zero in blue, the other Scorpion in yellow—set against a dark, textured background. The cabinet is constructed primarily from wood or MDF, with plastic and metal components for the controls and trim. The overall finish is glossy with vibrant, high-contrast graphics, making it a visually striking object suitable for arcades or entertainment spaces.
description: A Mortal Kombat arcade game cabinet with bold character artwork, a large screen, and a colorful control panel for two players. The cabinet features a glossy finish, prominent branding, and a coin slot on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Mortal Kombat marquee, display screen, dual-player control panel with joysticks and buttons, and the coin slot below.
description_view_1: Left side view featuring large, detailed artwork of Sub-Zero in blue, with the control panel and part of the screen visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the plain, dark back panel of the cabinet with no visible artwork or controls.
description_view_3: Right side view featuring large, detailed artwork of Scorpion in yellow, with the control panel and part of the screen visible.
attribute_screen_type: CRT display, flat front with a visible bezel, medium size typical of classic arcade cabinets.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two sets of joysticks and six buttons per player, arranged side-by-side for two-player gameplay, with colored buttons and a red/black color scheme.
attribute_marquee_artwork: Present; features the Mortal Kombat logo in fiery colors with bold text and a dragon emblem, matching the game's theme.
attribute_side_panel_graphics: Both side panels feature large, detailed character artwork: Sub-Zero on the left in blue and Scorpion on the right in yellow, set against a dark, textured background.
